docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-03-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED JAN-20-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAVAN, ROSE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLLINS, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAVAN, ROSE $2,772.42 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,852.42, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $3080.47 AND ATTRIBUTES 10% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF COLLINS, JAMES ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CAVAN, ROSE
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY COLLINS, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT CAVAN, ROSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
